prompt: Using the ride-hailing app sample UI, design a subscription plan page listing monthly and yearly options for premium service.
prompt_refined: Generate a new mobile UI screen for a ride-hailing application, adopting the clean, minimalist design, rounded corners, and pink/white color scheme observed in image 1. This new screen should represent a 'Premium Subscription' page. Feature distinct UI cards or sections, one for a 'Monthly Premium' plan and another for a 'Yearly Premium' plan, prominently displaying their respective prices and key benefits. Position these plan options centrally and vertically, with a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Subscribe Now') at the bottom of the screen, styled consistently with the 'Book Now' button in image 1.
objects: UI card for "Monthly Premium" plan, centrally positioned
Key benefits list within "Monthly Premium" card
UI card for "Yearly Premium" plan, centrally positioned
Key benefits list within "Yearly Premium" card
"Subscribe Now" call-to-action button at the bottom
